title: wicked coverage report (v1.0.0)
description: The resolved-or-flagged coverage ledger — part of the @wicked/domain-model-schema bundle. Formalizes anti-legacy's coverage-report.json (the coverage.py output). Every behavior-bearing estate SymbolId is either RESOLVED (a rule annotation at/above the confidence threshold) or RISK-flagged (on the HITL research queue) — never bare/unaccounted. `coverage` = (resolved + risk_flagged) / behavior_bearing, in [0,1], rounded to 4 dp; this is the rule_coverage value crew's GATE_3 requires to equal 1.0. The report doubles as a gate predicate: the engine exits non-zero and lists the unaccounted SymbolIds when coverage < 1.0. Deterministic: unaccounted_nodes and per_app are sorted by SymbolId / app name.

unaccountedNode.description: A behavior-bearing node that reached neither RESOLVED nor RISK — the coverage hole. References the estate SymbolId; carries no copy of the node's source.

total.description: Total nodes in the graph (all kinds).

behavior_bearing.description: The coverage denominator — behavior-bearing nodes only (config-driven via coverage.behavior_kinds, never hardcoded).

resolved.description: Behavior-bearing nodes RESOLVED (rule annotation at/above resolve_threshold).

risk_flagged.description: Behavior-bearing nodes RISK-flagged (on the HITL queue, incl. below-threshold 'resolved').

unaccounted.description: Behavior-bearing nodes that are still bare (the coverage hole). MUST be 0 for coverage == 1.0.

coverage.description: (resolved + risk_flagged) / behavior_bearing, 4 dp. The rule_coverage value crew's GATE_3 gates on == 1.0. Vacuously 1.0 when there are no behavior-bearing nodes.

mean_confidence.description: Mean confidence across RESOLVED nodes carrying a numeric confidence, 4 dp (resolved-only, per coverage.py).

resolve_threshold.description: Confidence threshold at/above which a rule annotation counts as RESOLVED (default 0.75).

per_app.description: Per-app breakdown, sorted by app name.

unaccounted_nodes.description: The bare behavior-bearing nodes, sorted by SymbolId. Empty iff coverage == 1.0.
